description: Create a GitHub Actions workflow named EVE - Integration Tests that runs on every pull request to the main branch. The workflow should have concurrent job groups based on the GitHub reference and cancel any in-progress jobs. It should have four ubuntu-latest jobs: install, cpm, fetch, and multi-arch, each using a specific container image. Each job should fetch the current branch, configure and build EVE using CMake with different installation methods, and run various tests.
